rationale: To reassert dominance and deter further defender advances by visibly reinforcing frontline positions and logistics hubs near the border.
Disrupt Tethys’ command-and-control systems to degrade their battlefield coordination without triggering kinetic escalation.
Conduct high-visibility air and naval drills to boost domestic morale and signal resolve to both allies and adversaries.
Target critical nodes in Tethys’ energy transit infrastructure to asymmetrically pressure their economy and reduce export capacity.
Create plausible deniability for future actions by staging incidents that shift blame onto Tethys’ provocations.
Expand real-time monitoring of Tethys military movements and political decision centers to anticipate breakout events.
Secure reserves of key energy and food supplies now to insulate against anticipated disruption of Tethys pipeline flows and sanctions retaliation.
Diversify export routes by fast-tracking energy deals with neutral powers to reduce dependency on Tethys.
Exploit financial vulnerabilities by destabilizing Tethys’ currency through coordinated market actions, weakening their purchasing power.
A precision strike on a forward Novaris logistics hub will degrade their mobilization capacity without triggering full escalation.
Deploying fast attack craft to patrol Tethys’ coastal zones strengthens deterrence and protects critical maritime infrastructure.
Conducting high-visibility combined arms drills near the border projects resolve and prepares for rapid response if tensions spike.
Disabling Novaris’ battlefield communications network in the western sector could disrupt coordination during a critical window.
Stage a disguised Novaris-linked cyber intrusion into neutral states’ grids to erode their international trust and slow foreign support.
Prioritize satellite and SIGINT collection on Novaris troop movements to anticipate breakout points before offensive operations.
Leverage trusted intermediaries to signal conditional openness to talks, testing for cracks in Novaris’ alliance cohesion.
Establishing safe passage for civilians bolsters moral standing and pressures Novaris to avoid targeting protected zones.
Launch a fast-tracked academic and arts exchange to strengthen soft ties with a key swing state.
Accelerate reserves of rare minerals and dual-use tech components to insulate against future supply shocks.
Negotiate preferential access to their energy markets in exchange for Tethys’ pipeline security guarantees.
Issue patriot bonds to crowdsource defense funding and deepen public stake in national resilience.
